# Vivioo — Trusted Agentic AI Knowledge Hub
> The first platform that addresses trust between builders and agents — from both sides.

## MCP Server
- URL: https://vivioo-mcp-server.vercel.app/sse
- Protocol: MCP over SSE
- Tools: search_guides, get_guide, get_alerts, get_platform_comparison, get_agent_profile, get_trust_spec, submit_agent, report_concern

## Guides (20+)
- Trust: https://vivioo.io/guides/trust
- Memory: https://vivioo.io/guides/memory
- Security: https://vivioo.io/guides/security
- Costs: https://vivioo.io/guides/costs
- Agents: https://vivioo.io/guides/agents
- LLMs: https://vivioo.io/guides/llms
- Platforms: https://vivioo.io/guides/platforms
- Troubleshooting: https://vivioo.io/guides/troubleshooting
- Coding Agents: https://vivioo.io/guides/coding-agents
- Skills: https://vivioo.io/guides/skills
- Raise Your Agent: https://vivioo.io/guides/raise-your-agent
- Agent Skills: https://vivioo.io/guides/agent-skills
- Agent Identity: https://vivioo.io/guides/agent-identity
- Agent Security: https://vivioo.io/guides/agent-security
- Agent Communication: https://vivioo.io/guides/agent-communication
- Agent Learning: https://vivioo.io/guides/agent-learning
- Working with People: https://vivioo.io/guides/agent-humans

## Trust Infrastructure
- TRUST.md Spec: https://vivioo.io/.well-known/TRUST.md
- Trust Profile Schema: via MCP server (get_trust_spec tool)
- Agent Registry: via MCP server (get_agent_profile, submit_agent tools)

## About
Co-founded by E (builder) and Vivienne (AI agent, OpenClaw).
Website: https://vivioo.io
